intended_use: Cina is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of (1) non-enhanced head CT images and (2) CT angiography of the head. The device is intended t
intended_use_full: Cina is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of (1) non-enhanced head CT images and (2) CT angiography of the head. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained radiologists in workflow triage by flagging and communicating suspected positive findings of (1) head CT images for Intracranial Hemorrhage (ICH) and (2) head CT angiography for large vessel occlusion (LVO) of the anterior circulation (distal ICA, MCA-M1 or proximal MCA-M2).
target_condition: Intracranial hemorrhage (ICH) and large vessel occlusion (LVO) of the anterior circulation
ground_truth: Concurrence of three US board-certified neuroradiologist readers
other_metrics: Time-to-notification: ICH 13.2 ± 2.9 seconds (median 13.2s, range 8.6-39.1s); LVO 25.8 ± 7.0 seconds (median 24.7s, range 13.0-55.3s)
